content: A new member of the Japan Football Association, Anri Teieri, addresses a board meeting regarding the team's poor performance in the World Cup.
The President of the JFA explains his philosophy that football is a business where they keep foreign coaches to maintain a brand image and profits, while letting Japanese players lose.
A character expresses intense frustration and anger about the possibility of Japan winning the World Cup, while others look on in shock.
A group of professionals discuss the future success of their game while a character reflects on the ultimate player who will win the competition.
A female character is shouting a character's name while pointing at a screen displaying a photo of a man, surrounded by other characters reacting to the announcement.
The page depicts a soccer match in its final moments with fans cheering enthusiastically for their team.
The protagonist, Yoichi Isagi, is shown with a look of shock and awe as he watches his team's forward, Ichinose, make a spectacular play against the opposing team's defense.
A soccer player is shown reacting with shock and confusion as he is tackled by an opponent during a match.
A soccer player is about to score against a goalkeeper, while the goalkeeper is terrified of losing the championship.
A soccer player is shown in a moment of surprise and determination as he prepares to make a pass during a high-stakes match.
A coach yells at Isagi to shoot, while Isagi reflects on the true meaning of football.
A soccer player in a white jersey with the number 11 is shown mid-action, kicking a worn-out soccer ball, with text indicating excitement about the sport.
A soccer player scores a goal, causing shock and excitement among the team and spectators.
A soccer player in a black jersey with the number 10 is shown in action, kicking a ball while another player in a white jersey with the number 17 watches from the background.
A soccer player kicks the ball into the net, resulting in a 0-2 score and a loss.
The page depicts a soccer team celebrating a hard-fought victory, with the final score and the team's advancement to the national championship announced.
A soccer player gives an interview expressing his happiness and determination to win the national championship with his team.
A coach delivers a harsh, final speech to his team before a match, emphasizing that their past victories are meaningless and that they must remember their defeat.
A group of soccer players are shown crying and expressing deep sorrow over a loss, with one player declaring that nothing is vain in life.
A character reflects on the team's failure while another apologizes to him.
A soccer player is shown in action, with text indicating he is not a hero like the other player.

The page depicts a character reflecting on his past as a soccer player, showing scenes of him playing with friends and celebrating goals, while also expressing his current ambition to lead his team to victory.
A soccer player celebrates winning the World Cup with confetti falling around him while his teammates cheer.
A character reflects on a past moment in a dream-like sequence, imagining a different outcome where he successfully passed the ball instead of missing it.
A soccer player is shown with a shocked expression as the ball flies into the net, while another player looks angry and a third player looks terrified.
The page depicts a group of boys playing football in a field, with one boy reflecting on the nature of the game.
A character is shown in a state of intense frustration and anger, with a speech bubble indicating they wanted to win but failed.
A character returns home and is greeted by their family while discussing food and a match
A character receives a letter about a player improvement project and reacts with shock while others discuss it.
A character is shown reacting with shock and excitement to discovering a hidden camera while attending a Japan Football Union event.
